name: EdwLoadPrmRateRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte_min_cyc AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS MIN_CYC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'PREMIUM_RATING' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE t SET t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC t JOIN cte_min_cyc c ON c.TRGT_SYS_CD = t.TRGT_SYS_CD AND c.SRC_SYS_CD = t.SRC_SYS_CD AND c.SUBJ_CD = t.SUBJ_CD WHERE t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND t.RUN_CYC_NO >= c.MIN_CYC

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
JobName:
EdwLoadPrmRateRunCycUpdt_EE

EDW Premium Rating Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Premium Rating with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is greater than or equal to the current run cycle used for extracting.
